> The title of this PR must follow Conventional Commits:
> `feat: ...` `fix: ...` `refactor: ...` `chore: ...` `docs: ...` `test: ...`

## Description

<!-- Describe the changes made and why. -->

## Related issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat`: new feature
- [ ] `fix`: bug fix
- [ ] `refactor`: refactoring without behavior change
- [ ] `test`: adding or updating tests
- [ ] `chore`: maintenance, dependencies, CI
- [ ] `docs`: documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles without errors (`dotnet build`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`dotnet test`)
- [ ] New behaviors are covered by tests
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] PR targets `main` via a `feat/...`, `fix/...` or `chore/...` branch

<!-- Screenshots, logs, diagrams if relevant. -->
